Description.English: Adds several cheat commands to keybinds. Helpful to test mods or simply to cheat.
Description.German: Legt einige Cheatbefehle auf Tastenkombinationen. Praktisch beim Testen von Mods oder einfach um zu cheaten.

changelog.1.04:
- Reworked the keybind system: Use Alt+C (downwards) and Alt+B (upwards) to select a cheat. Use Alt+V to trigger the selected cheat.
- Added several new cheats
- Fast quit without saving is now Alt+F4.
